description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-story office building with a symmetrical facade and a flat, dark roof. The exterior walls are light gray and feature evenly spaced, rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern across all visible sides. The main entrance is centrally located on the longer side, marked by a small overhang or awning, and there is a secondary, smaller structure attached to one side, possibly serving as an annex or covered entry. The building's design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation, reflecting a functional and institutional architectural style. The windows are uniformly sized and distributed, contributing to a sense of order and regularity. No visible signage or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A rectangular, multi-story office building with a flat dark roof, light gray facade, and evenly spaced grid windows. The design is functional and symmetrical, with a central entrance and a small annex structure.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the building is visible, showing three rows of windows and the flat roof, with the annex structure barely visible behind.
description_view_1: The long facade is shown, featuring the main entrance at the center, a grid of windows, and the annex structure clearly visible to the right.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end is visible, with the annex structure extending outward and partially obscuring the side of the building.
description_view_3: The long facade is shown again, with the annex structure now on the left, and the main entrance at the center of the main building.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal and vertical grids across all facades.
